content:
To: Miguel Brown <miguel.brown@initech.com>, Tina Davis <tina.davis@starkindustries.com>, Leo Jackson <leo.jackson@lexcorp.biz>
Date: 2024-07-18 06:46:44
Subject: Re: Security Audit Findings
Message-ID: <4a5d6eb71829da1a@wayneenterprises.com>

All, 

Following up from the Hackathon earlier today. Here are the action items:

- @Miguel: Finalize the budget by Wednesday (target: 10/8)    
- @Tina: Schedule the OKR Planning review with Marketing
- @Tina: Update the API Gateway configuration per our discussion
- @Fatima: Send out the revised Project Catalyst timeline by EOW

Next meeting: Monday at 8:00. Calendar invite to follow.

Thanks everyone,
Fatima  
--
Fatima Hernandez
Wayneenterprises | Data Science Department
Phone: +1-996-341-7089 | Email: fatima.hernandez@wayneenterprises.com

subject: Re: Security Audit Findings
content:
Hi Miguel,

Thanks for flagging this. I've escalated to the Sales team and they're looking
into the API Gateway issue. Current status:
- Root cause: oversized payload from partner API
- Impact: ~76 users affected in North America
- ETA for fix: 13:30 JST today
- Severity: P1

I'll keep this thread updated as we learn more. Miguel is the point person if  
you need immediate assistance.    

Workaround: Switch to backup endpoint.

Regards,
Tina
---
Tina Davis | DevOps Engineer
Starkindustries
M: +1-565-361-1915 | E: tina.davis@starkindustries.com

subject: Re: Security Audit Findings
content:
Hi Leo,

I had a call with DataFlow Systems today about the Auth Service integration. Key
takeaways:

- They can deliver the beta phase by 6/27, which is 1 weeks ahead of our
schedule
- Pricing: $162K for the base package + $22K for Observability Stack add-on
- They require a 3-year commitment minimum
- Technical contact will be Priya Hernandez (Product Manager)

For comparison, CloudSync Inc. quoted $172K with a more flexible contract.

Should we bring this to the Roadmap Sync for a final decision?

Best,
Fatima
